raw_response:
Fibroblasts in the cell-rich zone primarily secrete:
\boxed{A} Based on the medical evidence focusing on connective tissue and collagen production, fibroblasts are known to produce significant amounts of extracellular matrix components including collagens. Among the types mentioned, Type I collagen is particularly abundant and crucial for forming dense connective tissue found in areas like the cell-rich zones. Therefore, the correct option is \boxed{A}.
